new_value: Validated current T-Echo Zephyr firmware end-to-end on fleet AMI ami-0764d1b512e22671f. Added Renode-scoped legacy SPI/USB overrides and fixed lichen_l2 disable returning an uninitialized value. Final ELF 75912f6657aab318eab188e10b73177d28921c5c103affdc2138a4aaa7307693 booted Zephyr/puck, connected to lichen-sim, and produced 3 measured transmissions. Three-pass reviews completed twice; abort recovery and EBS bootstrap drift tracked in project-LICHEN-jct9 and project-LICHEN-uc7m. All temporary AWS resources removed and persistent EBS verified available/unattached.
